name: pedigree-puzzle-generator
description: Evagene integration example: generate random Mendelian-inheritance pedigree puzzles for teaching.

scripts.test: node --import tsx --test test/answerExplainer.test.ts test/config.test.ts test/evageneClient.test.ts test/modeHeuristics.test.ts test/orchestrator.test.ts test/puzzleBlueprint.test.ts test/writer.test.ts
